news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY and FBYY
GraniteShares launches new YieldBOOST ETFs on MSTR (MTYY) and PLTR (PLYY).

holdings.infoBox: MTYY is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 69.42%, United States Treasury Bills 3.545% at 26.95%, Us Dollars at 5.04%, Put Mstu June 3.17 06/18/2026 at 0.70%, and Put Mstu June 3.53 06/22/2026 at 0.20%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST MSTR ETF (MTYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Strategy Inc (MSTR). The fund sells put option and holds other MSTR-leveraged ETFs MTYY was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
